mapper.sql: id, phone, password, nickname, real_name, email, avatar, role_type, status, tenant_id, last_login_time, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user ( phone, password, nickname, real_name, email, avatar, role_type, status, tenant_id, last_login_time, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{phone}, #{password}, #{nickName}, #{realName}, #{email}, #{avatar}, #{roleType}, #{status}, #{tenantId}, #{lastLoginTime}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET last_login_time = #{lastLoginTime}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) > 0 FROM user WHERE phone = #{phone}
SELECT FROM user WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
